steps.title: Expand the absolute value into two cases
steps.content:
The equation $|7 - x| = 80$ means $7 - x$ equals 80 or $7 - x$ equals $-80$:
$$7 - x = 80 \quad \text{or} \quad 7 - x = -80$$

steps.title: Solve both equations and find their sum
steps.content:
From $7 - x = 80$: $x = 7 - 80 = -73$
From $7 - x = -80$: $x = 7 + 80 = 87$

Sum: $(-73) + 87 = 14$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
